Men's Basketball Roster Schedule Coaches Stats Camps Giving Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

3 Nic Smith

  • Position Guard
  • Height 6-0
  • Class Redshirt Sophomore
  • Hometown Hales Corner, Wis.
  • Highschool Whitnall HS
  • Prev School South Florida
  • Major Business Management
  • Bio
  • Stats

Biography

2025-26: Saw action in one game before missing the remainder of the season due to injury. 

Before MSUM: Spent the previous two seasons playing for NCAA Division I South Florida...played in two games as a true freshman in 2023-24, logging four minutes of action...redshirted his sophomore season...was a two-time AAC All-Academic Team member and was a member of South Florida's 2023-24 AAC regular season championship run..

Prep: Played prep basketball for Whitnall High School, helping his team to a 25-4 record as a senior...played for Wisconsin Playground Club UAA.

Personal: Son of Kathryn (Douglas) Anderer and Robert Smith. Majoring in business management.

Statistics

Season Statistics

Season Statistics

No statistics available for this season.

Career Statistics

There are no statistics available for this player.
